name: Women's Plastic Oval Tortoise Shell Sunglasses - A New Day™ Assorted Browns: UV Protection, Recycled Frame
description:
Step into the sun in chic style with these Plastic Oval Tortoise Shell Sunglasses from A New Day™. These plastic sunglasses will elevate your look with the tortoiseshell frames and gray lenses, and the stylish oval silhouette looks great with casual and dressier ensembles alike. Plus, the lenses' UV protection design helps keep your eyes safe from the sun.

A New Day™: Style that goes wherever you do.
